mapper.select: SELECT id, topic_id, explanation_en, explanation_vi, illustration_text, examples_json, generated_at FROM grammar_library_contents WHERE topic_id = #{topicId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO grammar_library_contents (topic_id, explanation_en, explanation_vi, illustration_text, examples_json) VALUES (#{topicId}, #{explanationEn}, #{explanationVi}, #{illustrationText}, #{examplesJson})
